description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser burning metamagic rod 9,000 gp Burning metamagic rod 32,500 gp Greater burning metamagic rod 73,000 DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that deal extra acid or fire damage as though using the Burning Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Burning Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser burning metamagic rod 4,500 gp Burning metamagic rod 16,250 gp Greater burning metamagic rod 36,500 gp
